mapper.select: SELECT key_id as keyId, tenant_id as tenantId, key_name as keyName, encrypted_key as encryptedKey, algorithm, key_size as keySize, is_active as isActive, rotation_policy as rotationPolicy, rotated_dt as rotatedDt, reg_dt as regDt, upd_dt as updDt FROM tb_encryption_key WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_active = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT key_id as keyId, tenant_id as tenantId, key_name as keyName, encrypted_key as encryptedKey, algorithm, key_size as keySize, is_active as isActive, rotation_policy as rotationPolicy, rotated_dt as rotatedDt, reg_dt as regDt, upd_dt as updDt FROM tb_encryption_key WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND key_name = #{keyName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_encryption_key (key_id, tenant_id, key_name, encrypted_key, algorithm, key_size, is_active, rotation_policy, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES ( UUID(), #{tenantId}, #{keyName}, #{encryptedKey}, #{algorithm}, #{keySize}, #{isActive}, #{rotationPolicy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_encryption_key SET is_active = #{isActive}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE key_id = #{keyId}
UPDATE tb_encryption_key SET rotated_dt = #{rotatedDt}, rotation_policy = #{rotationPolicy}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE key_id = #{keyId}
mapper.select: SELECT key_id as keyId, tenant_id as tenantId, key_name as keyName, encrypted_key as encryptedKey, algorithm, key_size as keySize, is_active as isActive, rotation_policy as rotationPolicy, rotated_dt as rotatedDt, reg_dt as regDt, upd_dt as updDt FROM tb_encryption_key WHERE key_id = #{keyId} LIMIT 1
